productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women's Adi Groove Blue Flip Flop
description: Spice up your relaxed days with these ADI Groove slippers from adidas. Available in funky colours, your expeditions will be all the more comfortable with its grooved footbed. Pair it with slim jeans and any bright top for a stylish casual look.UpperThick fabric thong straps with piping on edges for protection from abrasion and blisteringFabric toe separator for maximum comfortMidsoleGrooved footbed for constant massaging of the foot while walkingFoam footbed with graphics and brand mark for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum tractionPivot point on the lateral side of the foot for easy movement and supportshoe careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine washSpice up your relaxed days with these ADI Groove slippers from adidas.
